words.def: a hard crystalline metamorphic rock that takes a high polish; used for sculpture and as building material
words.zh: n. 大理石, 石彈, 雕刻品
a. 真的, 真實的, 實際的, 實在的, 不動(產)的, 實數的

words.def: (usually followed by `to') having the necessary means or skill or know-how or authority to do something
words.zh: a. 能幹的, 能夠的

words.def: an animal that produces gametes (spermatozoa) that can fertilize female gametes (ova)
words.zh: n. 男人, 雄性動物

words.def: a room or establishment where alcoholic drinks are served over a counter
words.zh: n. 條, 棒, 酒吧, 柵, 障礙物

words.def: a unit of surface area equal to 100 square meters
words.zh: be的現在時複數或第二人稱單數
